fields.title: Define Autoresearch schemas, errors, paths, and repo boundary
fields.description: Create the strict persisted-state and file boundary for Autoresearch. This task owns config decoding, JSONL line schemas, path resolution, typed errors, and file I/O for the sidecar files autoresearch.jsonl, autoresearch.md, autoresearch.sh, autoresearch.checks.sh, and autoresearch.ideas.md.
fields.design: Add src/autoresearch/schema.ts, errors.ts, paths.ts, and repo.ts. Decode autoresearch.config.json strictly from ctx.cwd, resolve the effective work dir, validate it explicitly, and read or write autoresearch.jsonl and sidecar files through FileSystem with atomic helpers. JSONL config lines and experiment lines are separate schemas. autoresearch.jsonl is the only canonical persisted history; there is no session-history reconstruction path.
